what_it_does: A runtime generator library for the organism layer: pure functions that return SVG or HTML strings for icons, diagrams, charts, network graphs, connectors, phase strips, testimonials, check matrices, and synthetic artifact thumbnails. All colouring is deferred to CSS custom properties and several generators use a seeded deterministic PRNG so the same inputs always produce the same output.
observations: Exports a DNA.org.* API of string-returning visual organisms including icon, iconStrip, mesh, hubNetwork, consequencesBox, cascade, detailStrip, phaseStrip, testimonial, checkMatrix, donut, bars, graph, connector, taxonomyEmergence, designLibraryObject, fileStack, planThumbnail, projectTileGrid, versionStack, sourcePanelVisual, evidenceBand, interfaceFragment, artifactFlow, artifactCluster, boardGroups, constellation, and navRail.
The icon set is hand-coded as 24x24 path data with a 1.5 stroke, round caps and joins, and open-line style; colour defaults to var(--bronze-line).
A mulberry32 seeded PRNG drives deterministic 'weather' in mesh and organic jitter in hubNetwork.
Every output uses CSS variables such as --gold, --bronze-line, --page, --nested, and --line instead of hardcoded colours.

graph implements a containment-tree layout that spreads siblings along the screen's long axis and depth along the short axis, with folder orbit dots showing child type composition, type-hue colouring, search and highlight dimming, and geometry exported through o.out.
The file contains several repeated local esc helpers and many layout constants embedded directly in functions.
A synthetic versus real mode appears in designLibraryObject: synthetic tiles draw abstract cover hints while real cover data-URIs are rendered as image elements.
Comments embed design rationale and attributions, for example decisions about folder collars, octagon cores, and containment cascades.
standouts: graph: the most complex organism, projecting a folder/file tree into a pannable, zoomable, columnar graph with state sockets, type hues, and folder orbit dots.
connector: a symbolic plug, socket, and authorization motif rendered as an SVG with bronze socket, dashed transport line, and gold octagon plug core.
taxonomyEmergence: a dedicated visual for provisional kinds giving way to real kinds discovered from open coverage.
designLibraryObject and the artefact family: reusable synthetic or real material-density generators for design libraries, file stacks, plans, project grids, version stacks, and more.
Deterministic rendering via the mulberry32 seeded PRNG.
conventions: Functions are pure (data, options) -> SVG or HTML string and do not touch the DOM.
Theme tokens are referenced as CSS custom properties, keeping the module palette-agnostic.
An IIFE wrapper attaches the API to a global object.
Inline SVG construction uses template literals and fixed numeric layout constants.
Seeded randomness is used for organic variation while preserving reproducibility.
Local escaping helpers are redefined in multiple places rather than imported from a shared utility.
concerns: Four separate esc helpers are copy-pasted; any fix must be applied in multiple places.
Many functions are long and deeply nested, mixing geometry, styling, and string concatenation, which complicates maintenance and testing.
Font family names such as Plus Jakarta Sans and IBM Plex Mono are hardcoded in generated output, so missing fonts degrade the visuals.
No validation of injected callbacks such as iconSVG and typeHue or of real cover data-URIs is visible from this file alone.
The file is truncated in the prompt, so the full implementations of planThumbnail and later artifact generators cannot be verified.
notes: A dense, token-coloured SVG factory that turns data into thematic visuals; the graph and artifact-family generators carry most of the design intent.
questions: Which module loads this IIFE and exposes it as DNA.org?
Where are the CSS token definitions that supply variables such as --gold, --bronze-line, --goldwash, and --warmpole-2?
How are iconSVG and typeHue injected into graph at runtime?
What viewer or component consumes these SVG and HTML strings and handles pan, zoom, and tap for graph?
Are real cover data-URIs in designLibraryObject bounded or sanitized elsewhere?
What is the intended responsive scaling behavior for generated SVGs across viewports?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the header describes it as live generators for the organism and icon layers returning token-coloured SVG and HTML strings, and the implementations do exactly that.
apparent_themes: Synthetic material density as fallback for real assets
Containment and projection as spatial layout
intention_signals: To build a code-first visual system in which every illustration, icon, chart, graph, and artifact thumbnail is generated from data and theme tokens rather than static images, enabling live theming, deterministic renders, and reusable organisms across the surface layer.
novelty: Folder orbit dots encode child composition and type rather than numeric counts; the graph projects a file tree onto screen axes with camera-movement semantics; and a whole family of artifact generators supports both synthetic abstract placeholders and real photographic covers.
contribution: A reusable, deterministic, CSS-variable-based runtime for producing thematic SVG and HTML organisms such as icons, network diagrams, charts, graphs, connectors, and synthetic or real artifact thumbnails, so the surface layer can render consistent, theme-aware visuals from code and data.
summary_for_embedding: organisms.js is a runtime SVG and HTML generator library for a design system's organism layer, producing token-coloured, deterministic icons, diagrams, charts, graphs, connectors, and artifact thumbnails from pure functions.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a code-driven, theme-agnostic visual grammar that renders live illustrations and data diagrams using CSS custom properties and seeded deterministic variation.

symbols.does: Renders a single drafted icon as an SVG string.
symbols.description: Looks up path data in the ICON and P tables by name and wraps it in a 24x24 SVG with token stroke colour, size, and cap or join settings. Defaults to the ledger icon if the name is unknown.

symbols.does: Renders a row of icons on a dashed rail with an optional descend-to-plug motif.
symbols.description: Places each named icon horizontally, draws a dashed bronze rail beneath them, adds vertical drop lines, and optionally draws a dashed descent ending in a gold plug square.

symbols.does: Returns a seeded deterministic 32-bit PRNG function.
symbols.description: Implements the mulberry32 algorithm so that mesh, hubNetwork, and other organic generators produce identical output for the same seed.

symbols.does: Generates an ambient network mesh SVG.
symbols.description: Creates n random nodes inside a width and height box, links each node to its two nearest forward neighbours, and colours nodes by distance from a heart point using gold, ochre, and bronze token gradients.

symbols.does: Maps a point's distance from the heart to a token colour.
symbols.description: Inner helper of mesh; returns var(--gold), var(--ochre), or var(--bronze) based on normalized distance from the heart coordinate.

symbols.does: Generates a typed hub-and-spoke network SVG.
symbols.description: Renders a central polygon hub with radial spokes and labelled satellite nodes; supports organic angle jitter, weighted proximity and opacity, direction arrows, and label-fitting circles.

symbols.does: Returns an HTML panel of controlled-density figures.
symbols.description: Builds a bordered, rounded box with a small uppercase title and rows of figure and label pairs, optionally starring the first row in gold.

symbols.does: Generates a vertical time-spine SVG with stage boxes.
symbols.description: Draws a dashed spine, stage circles, elbow connectors, and rounded rectangles for each stage label and name pair, alternating box positions.

symbols.does: Returns a tiny-entry texture HTML strip.
symbols.description: Joins an array of small monospace entries with middots in a faint, spaced line.

symbols.does: Renders a chevron phase strip with one active segment.
symbols.description: Builds a horizontal SVG of chevron-shaped segments; the active index is filled with goldwash and stroked in gold while inactive segments are outlined.

symbols.does: Builds one chevron segment for phaseStrip.
symbols.description: Inner helper that computes chevron polygon points, fill and stroke, and centred label text for a given segment index.

symbols.does: Returns a quoted testimonial HTML block.
symbols.description: Wraps a quote in large gold quotation marks and italic body text, followed by a right-aligned bold attribution, with an optional gold border frame.

symbols.does: Renders a comparison matrix of gold checks and muted-red crosses.
symbols.description: Builds an HTML table with column headers, rows of labels, and SVG check or cross cells; one self column and row are highlighted on goldwash.

symbols.does: Returns a CSS background style for the highlighted column.
symbols.description: Inner helper of checkMatrix that emits a goldwash background declaration when the column index matches the self column.

symbols.does: Generates a donut chart SVG.
symbols.description: Draws a segmented ring from values using token colours, with an optional centre label, by computing stroke-dasharray lengths on a circle.

symbols.does: Generates a simple bar chart SVG.
symbols.description: Draws normalized vertical bars with an optional ordinal colour ramp and configurable bar width, gap, and height.

symbols.does: Resolves an ordinal colour token by index.
symbols.description: Tries DNA.ordinal(i, n) and falls back to a fixed ramp from gold through bronze, sampling the axis by position.

symbols.does: Generates a containment-tree graph SVG.
symbols.description: Projects a folder and file tree into columns along the screen's long and short axes, renders folder orbit dots, type-hued file nodes, containment connectors, search and highlight dimming, and exports geometry via o.out.

symbols.does: Looks up the children of a tree address.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; returns tree.childrenOf[addr] or an empty array.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters in a string.
symbols.description: Replaces ampersand, less-than, greater-than, and double-quote with named entities. Defined locally in graph.

symbols.does: Middle-truncates a label while preserving its extension.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; shortens strings over 18 characters, keeping the last extension so similar filenames remain distinguishable.

symbols.does: Computes a depth-level coordinate.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; returns the position of a column along the depth axis based on margin, index, depth gap, and node radius.

symbols.does: Builds orbiting type-dots for a folder node.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; places coloured dots around a folder icon, one per child, grouped by type and stacked in off-centred outer layers, with a divider between directory and file dots.

symbols.does: Builds one graph node group.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; creates a transform group containing a disc, optional type icon, optional orbit dots, label, and selection ring, with state-driven opacity and stroke.

symbols.does: Draws a curved dependency trace between two points.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; renders a quadratic Bezier link with an arrowhead near the target, optional flow dash animation class, and gold or bronze stroke.

symbols.does: Filters and sorts a column's child list.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; applies the query filter and address-alpha sort with directories first for a given parent.

symbols.does: Computes a sibling coordinate.
symbols.description: Inner helper of graph; positions siblings along the sibling axis, centring child columns under their active parent's coordinate.

symbols.does: Renders a plug and socket connector SVG.
symbols.description: Draws a bronze socket ring, dashed transport line, gold prongs, and a gold-outlined octagon plug core with a bolt glyph, plus radial and linear gradients for glow and warmth.

symbols.does: Visualizes provisional kinds giving way to real kinds.
symbols.description: Draws dashed ghost pills for prior guesses on the left, filled emerged-kind pills on the right, and dashed transition arrows with gold heads between them.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters in a string.
symbols.description: A second local copy of the HTML escaping helper used inside taxonomyEmergence.

symbols.does: Computes a vertical centre for a pill row.
symbols.description: Inner helper of taxonomyEmergence; returns the y coordinate for a pill at index i given the column's vertical step.

symbols.does: Generates a design-library grid SVG.
symbols.description: Renders a cols-by-rows grid of design-object tiles with synthetic abstract cover hints or real cover images, gold highlight for a selected tile, and soft shadows.

symbols.does: Draws a synthetic cover hint for a design tile.
symbols.description: Inner helper of designLibraryObject; produces a warm tonal cover band and caption lines, varying the motif by tile index.

symbols.does: Generates a stack of document pages SVG.
symbols.description: Draws overlapping offset pages with a warm header band, content lines, and a single gold dog-ear on the front page.

symbols.does: Generates a framed architectural plan thumbnail SVG.
symbols.description: Draws a faint blueprint grid, room walls, and door arcs to represent a floor-plan source asset.

symbols.does: Draws a filled architectural wall rectangle.
symbols.description: Inner helper of planThumbnail; returns a poche-style rectangle for a wall segment.

symbols.does: Generates a grid of project tiles SVG.
symbols.description: Produces a tiled visual of project cards or thumbnails as part of the synthetic artefact family.

symbols.does: Generates a version-history stack SVG.
symbols.description: Renders stacked version snapshots or document states as a layered visual.

symbols.does: Generates a source-panel visual SVG.
symbols.description: Produces a panel representing a source document or asset view within the artefact family.

symbols.does: Generates an evidence-band visual SVG.
symbols.description: Renders a horizontal band of evidence or proof items as part of the artefact family.

symbols.does: Generates a UI-interface fragment SVG.
symbols.description: Draws a small synthetic UI component or screen fragment for use in compositions.

symbols.does: Generates an artifact-flow diagram SVG.
symbols.description: Renders a directional flow of artefacts or documents as part of the synthetic artefact family.

symbols.does: Generates an artifact-cluster visual SVG.
symbols.description: Draws a clustered grouping of artefact thumbnails or cards.

symbols.does: Builds an absolutely-positioned HTML card element string.
symbols.description: Inner helper used by artefact-family generators; returns a div with absolute positioning, rotation, shadow, and z-index styling.

symbols.does: Generates a board-with-groups visual SVG.
symbols.description: Renders a board layout containing grouped items or lanes as part of the artefact family.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters in a string.
symbols.description: A third local copy of the HTML escaping helper used later in the artefact-family functions.

symbols.does: Maps a state string to a token colour.
symbols.description: Inner helper; returns var(--gold) for living, active, live, open, or pending strings, otherwise var(--secondary).

symbols.does: Generates a constellation or network status SVG.
symbols.description: Renders a star constellation diagram with status-coloured nodes and labels, likely for monitoring or system-state visuals.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters in a string.
symbols.description: A fourth local copy of the HTML escaping helper used inside constellation.

symbols.does: Truncates a string to a maximum length with ellipsis.
symbols.description: Inner helper; returns the string unchanged if within n characters, otherwise slices and appends an ellipsis.

symbols.does: Maps a status string to a token colour.
symbols.description: Inner helper; returns var(--gold-pop) for supervised-live, live, or active, var(--bronze) for closed, and var(--ochre) otherwise.

symbols.does: Builds a star or glow marker SVG element.
symbols.description: Inner helper of constellation; returns an SVG string for a labelled star with optional glow and colour.

symbols.does: Generates a navigation-rail visual SVG.
symbols.description: Renders a vertical or compact navigation rail with icon and label items as part of the artefact family.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML special characters in a string.
symbols.description: A fifth local copy of the HTML escaping helper used inside navRail.
